notes: D44 EVENING (Apr 12 22:00 ET): TALKS COLLAPSED. Iran refused to commit to forgoing nuclear weapons. Vance left Islamabad with no deal. Ghalibaf blamed US. Polymarket ceasefire markets in dispute. Oil rising on collapse — Brent ~$98.50. Hormuz effectively re-closed by Iran — $1M+ tolls, ~5 vessels/day. Internet 1056+ hrs. Lebanon strikes continued (Israel rejected ceasefire with Hezbollah). US warships attempted Hormuz transit Apr 11, Iran issued 'last warning.' Ceasefire technically holding in Gulf but diplomatically dead.

D41 MIDDAY (Apr 09 12:00 ET): CEASEFIRE FRAGILE — LEBANON FRACTURE POINT. Iran accuses US of ceasefire violation over Israel's 100+ site Lebanon strikes (254+ killed Apr 9 per AJ). IRGC threatens to re-block Hormuz. Parliament speaker warns 'STRONG responses.' Iran considering pulling out of deal. BUT zero Iranian attacks D41 — ceasefire holding on Iran side. Oil rebounding: Brent ~$97.39 (up from $95.80). WTI ~$93.50. Hormuz still mostly blocked: 'negligible' traffic per Bloomberg, 800+ ships stranded, ~5-10/day vs 135 normal. Talks MOVED to Saturday Apr 12 Islamabad — VP Vance + Witkoff + Kushner delegation. Houthis attacked Maersk Yorktown (US-flagged) + Hope Island + MSC Grace F + MSC Gina + 2 US frigates. HRANA: 3,636 deaths. Hengaw: 6,620 military. Lebanon: 1,784+ killed, 5,977 wounded. Internet 984+ hrs.

D40 MORNING (Apr 08 09:05 ET): CEASEFIRE HOLDING. 2-week US-Iran truce in effect from overnight. Iran reopening Strait of Hormuz under armed-forces coordination; first tankers transiting. Brent -$13 to ~$95.80 (war premium unwinding). Islamabad talks Friday Apr 10 — VP Vance leading US, Pakistan PM Sharif + FM Munir mediating. Residual Gulf attacks (UAE/Bahrain/Kuwait) in early hours before stand-down. Israel still active in Lebanon (explicitly excluded from ceasefire). Trump: 'no enrichment' — will 'dig out nuclear dust.'
Source hierarchy: CNN/NBC/NPR/CBS/Axios/Bloomberg/Al Jazeera/Times of Israel/Reuters live blogs Apr 07-08 2026. Brent via oilpriceapi/Fortune Apr 08.

D39 13:00 ET update: US CENTCOM struck >90 military targets on Kharg Island early Apr 7 (naval mine storage, missile bunkers; oil infra deliberately spared per WSJ/CNN). Iran IRGC: 'restraint on Gulf oil infra is over.' Trump 8PM ET deadline ~7 hrs out. Brent ~$110.05.

D39 MORNING UPDATE (Apr 07 09:15 ET) - ~11 HRS to 8PM ET deadline. Trump POSTPONED power-plant strikes 5 days mid-deadline (says 'negotiating'). Israel hit Yahya Abad railway bridge (Kashan) 2 killed. Turkish Ocean Thunder + Iraqi crude transited Hormuz case-by-case. IRGC: 'whole civilisation' rebuttal - threatens to deprive US allies of oil/gas 'for many years.' Polymarket conflict-ends-Dec31 ticked 84->85%, US-Iran ceasefire-Jun30 54%. Sources: CNN live, AJ live, NPR, NBC, CBS, Bloomberg, UPI, Pravda EN, Polymarket, AAA, OilPriceAPI, EIA.

Day 39 PRE-DAWN (Apr 07) update - DEADLINE DAY. Sources: CNN, AJ, NPR, NBC, NYT, AP, Reuters, CBS, Bloomberg, CNBC, Haaretz, ToI, Euronews, Critical Threats, Alma Research, Wikipedia 2026 Iran war, AAA, WorldOil, EnergyConnects, Polymarket.

D39 DEADLINE DAY - TRUMP 8PM ET ULTIMATUM (~22 HRS): Iran rejected 15-pt Islamabad Accord; counteroffered 10-pt maximalist (permanent end, sanctions lift, reconstruction, NPT enrichment, Hormuz toll). Trump: 'significant but not good enough' - REFUSES to extend. 'Power Plant Day and Bridge Day wrapped up in one.' IRGC: 'helpless, nervous, stupid.' Khademi (IRGC Intel No.2) + Bagheri (Quds) killed in joint US-Israel strike. South Pars petrochem struck. F-15E WSO rescued by Delta/SEAL/CIA after 24hrs. Hormuz: 13 vessels/week transit (trickle, northern channel, Iran toll). Brent $109-111. WTI ~$108. AAA $4.119 (+$0.80/mo). HRANA 3,540+ killed (1,616 civilians, 244+ children). Internet 960+ hrs. Polymarket: ceasefire by Dec 31 = 76%; conflict-ends by Dec 31 = 85%. P(Trump follow-through) = 0.22 (up from 0.18). Scenarios: escalation 37% / attrition 28% / victory 13% / deal 12% / intervention 7% / fracture 3%.

sitrep: D44 EVENING (Apr 12 22:00 ET): ISLAMABAD TALKS COLLAPSED — NO DEAL. 21-hour marathon between US delegation (~300, led by VP Vance, Witkoff, Kushner) and Iran (~70, led by Ghalibaf, Araghchi) ended with no agreement. BREAKING POINT: Iran refused to commit to forgoing nuclear weapons. Vance left saying 'not enough.' Ghalibaf blamed US 'maximalist demands.' Pakistan PM Sharif expressed 'deep disappointment.'

HORMUZ RE-CLOSED: Iran re-halted Strait opening citing Israeli Lebanon strikes as ceasefire violations. $1M+ tolls on any transit. ~5 vessels/day (down from ~10 D41). US warships attempted transit Apr 11 — IRGC issued 'last warning.' 800+ ships still stranded.

OIL RISING ON COLLAPSE: Brent ~$98.50 (up from $97 D43, $95.80 D40). WTI ~$95.50. Markets pricing talk failure + Hormuz re-closure. If ceasefire expires Apr 21 with no new talks: rapid reversion to $110+.
LEBANON CONTINUES: Israel rejected ceasefire with Hezbollah. Strikes continued D42-D44. Lebanon toll rising. Iran using Lebanon as justification for Hormuz re-closure and talk hardline.

CEASEFIRE STATUS: Technically holding in the Gulf — zero direct US-Iran attacks since Apr 8. But diplomatically dead. No new talks scheduled. 9 days to Apr 21 expiry. Polymarket ceasefire-holds markets in dispute/crashing.
sitrep_fa: روز ۴۴ شب (۱۲ آوریل): مذاکرات اسلام‌آباد شکست — بدون توافق. ماراتن ۲۱ ساعته بین هیئت آمریکا (~۳۰۰، ونس، ویتکاف، کوشنر) و ایران (~۷۰، قالیباف، عراقچی) بدون نتیجه. نقطه شکست: ایران رد تعهد هسته‌ای. ونس: 'کافی نیست.' قالیباف: 'ماکسیمالیسم آمریکا.'
هرمز مجدداً بسته: ایران بازگشایی متوقف. $۱M+ عوارض. ~۵/روز. ناوهای آمریکا ۱۱ آوریل — 'آخرین هشدار.' ۸۰۰+ معطل.
نفت صعودی: برنت ~$۹۸.۵۰. WTI ~$۹۵.۵۰. شکست مذاکرات + هرمز. اگر ۲۱ آوریل: $۱۱۰+.
لبنان ادامه: اسرائیل رد آتش‌بس حزب‌الله. حملات ادامه.
آتش‌بس: فنی برقرار — صفر حمله مستقیم. اما دیپلماتیک مرده. ۹ روز تا پایان.

dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic down 90%, drones down 95%, 65+ vessels sunk.

dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.

dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than down 90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports down 61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.

dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation.

SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC named target EXECUTED. 6th salvo at Israel. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed.
dailyRows.capability: D20 REVISED: 45 missiles + 80 drones. SAMREF = FIRST Red Sea coast target. IRGC executing named target list: Kuwait, Qatar, SAMREF. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surged $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114 close. Citi: $120+. SAMREF 'impact minimal' per Aramco but symbolic significance enormous — Red Sea coast reached.
dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones reach Saudi western export infrastructure. Pipeline bypass routes no longer safe.

dailyRows.assessment: NOWRUZ INFLECTION + SUPPLY-SIDE WAR BEGINS. Bessent weaponizing oil supply. Netanyahu claiming victory for political off-ramp. IRGC still fighting but fracturing.

theoryEvaluation.title: LEBANON = THE FRACTURE POINT
theoryEvaluation.body: Israel's 100+ site strike in Lebanon (254+ killed Apr 9) is the single biggest threat to the ceasefire. Pakistan/Iran explicitly state Lebanon IS part of the deal. US/Israel say it is NOT. This interpretive gap is unbridgeable without a formal protocol. Iran accuses US of ceasefire violation. If Israel continues Lebanon operations at this intensity, Iran will likely withdraw from the ceasefire within days.

theoryEvaluation.title: HORMUZ DISPUTE = SECOND FRACTURE
theoryEvaluation.body: Despite ceasefire promise, Hormuz transit remains 'negligible' per Bloomberg. 800+ ships stranded, ~5-10/day vs 135 normal. IRGC now threatening to suspend transit due to Lebanon strikes. Iran using Hormuz as leverage: will not genuinely reopen until Lebanon issue resolved. This is the economic pressure point.

theoryEvaluation.title: CEASEFIRE ASYMMETRY = UNSTABLE
theoryEvaluation.body: Iran is honoring the ceasefire (0 attacks D41) while Israel is not (100+ Lebanon strikes). This asymmetry is politically untenable for Iran domestically. Parliament and IRGC under pressure to respond. The longer this asymmetry persists, the higher the collapse probability. Iran views Vance as more sympathetic — Saturday talks are the pressure valve.

theoryEvaluation.title: HOUTHI INDEPENDENCE = WILD CARD
theoryEvaluation.body: Houthis attacked 6 targets Apr 9 (Maersk Yorktown, Hope Island, MSC Grace F, MSC Gina, 2 US frigates). Houthis are NOT bound by US-Iran ceasefire. Their continued attacks keep Red Sea/Indian Ocean shipping disrupted and give Iran plausible deniability for proxy pressure.

theoryEvaluation.title: SATURDAY TALKS = CRITICAL WINDOW
theoryEvaluation.body: Talks moved from Friday to Saturday Apr 12. VP Vance + Witkoff + Kushner delegation signals high-level US commitment. Iran views Vance as more sympathetic to ending conflict. If Saturday produces a Lebanon protocol + Hormuz timeline: ceasefire survives. If not: collapse risk accelerates into Week 2.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: لبنان = نقطه شکست
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: حمله اسرائیل ۱۰۰+ سایت (۲۵۴+ کشته). پاکستان/ایران: لبنان شامل توافق. آمریکا/اسرائیل: نه. ایران اتهام نقض. اگر ادامه: خروج ایران.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: هرمز = شکاف دوم
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: بلومبرگ: ترافیک 'ناچیز.' ۸۰۰+ معطل. سپاه تهدید تعلیق بابت لبنان. ایران هرمز = اهرم فشار.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: آتش‌بس نامتقارن = ناپایدار
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ایران آتش‌بس رعایت (۰ حمله). اسرائیل نه (۱۰۰+ لبنان). سیاسی ناپایدار. مجلس و سپاه فشار پاسخ.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: حوثی مستقل
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ۶ هدف ۹ آوریل. مائرسک یورک‌تاون + ۵ دیگر. ملزم به آتش‌بس نیست.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: مذاکرات شنبه = پنجره حیاتی
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ونس + ویتکاف + کوشنر. ایران ونس را همدل‌تر می‌بیند. اگر پروتکل لبنان: بقا. اگر نه: فروپاشی.

endstate.title: Most likely (42%)
endstate.body: Negotiated deal. UP from 12%. Ceasefire + Saturday talks (Vance/Witkoff/Kushner) + Pakistan mediation. Iran 10-pt as working basis. Fragile but most plausible path. Lebanon protocol needed.

endstate.title: Second (28%)
endstate.body: Ceasefire collapse + re-escalation. NEW. Lebanon is the trigger — Israel's 100+ site strike, Iran accusing US of violation, IRGC threatening Hormuz re-block. If no Lebanon protocol by Saturday: collapse accelerates.

endstate.title: Third (15%)
endstate.body: Protracted attrition. DOWN from 30%. Ceasefire changes dynamics. If talks fail without collapse: frozen conflict at low intensity. War Powers clock paused.

endstate.title: Fourth (8%/5%/2%)
endstate.body: Victory 8% (ceasefire = exit narrative). Intervention 5% (if collapse = humanitarian). Fracture 2% (IRGC institutional coherence demonstrated).

endstate_fa.title: 1st (42%)
endstate_fa.body: توافق. UP ۱۲->۴۲٪. آتش‌بس + مذاکرات شنبه + میانجیگری پاکستان. شکننده اما محتمل‌ترین.

endstate_fa.title: 2nd (28%)
endstate_fa.body: فروپاشی آتش‌بس. جدید. لبنان = ماشه. اسرائیل ۱۰۰+ سایت. ایران اتهام نقض. سپاه تهدید هرمز.

endstate_fa.title: 3rd (15%)
endstate_fa.body: فرسایش. DOWN ۳۰->۱۵٪. آتش‌بس پویایی تغییر. درگیری منجمد.

diplomacy: ISLAMABAD TALKS COLLAPSED (Apr 12): 21-hour marathon between US (~300, VP Vance + Witkoff + Kushner) and Iran (~70, Ghalibaf + Araghchi). Pakistan PM Sharif mediated. BREAKING POINT: Iran refused to commit to forgoing nuclear weapons. Vance left saying 'not enough.' Ghalibaf blamed US 'maximalist demands.' Pakistan 'deeply disappointed.' No new talks scheduled.

NUCLEAR WEAPONS = DEAL-BREAKER: Iran's refusal to forgo nuclear capability was the unbridgeable gap. US demanded verifiable commitment. Iran offered IAEA cooperation but NOT weapons renunciation. This was predicted — 10-pt maximalism from Apr 7 included NPT enrichment rights.
HORMUZ CONFRONTATION Apr 11: US warships attempted Hormuz transit during talks. IRGC issued 'last warning.' Seen as US pressure tactic that backfired — hardened Iran position during negotiations.
LEBANON UNRESOLVED: Israel explicitly rejected ceasefire with Hezbollah. Strikes continued D42-D44. Iran using Lebanon devastation as justification for Hormuz re-closure and hardline stance.
NO DIPLOMATIC PATHWAY: No follow-up talks scheduled. Pakistan mediation exhausted. 9 days to ceasefire expiry. Without new initiative, ceasefire expires Apr 21 and war resumes.

plateauRationing.falsifiedBy: None. D40 ceasefire = political pause, stockpile thesis intact.

publishingDeepDive: PAPER/INK SUPPLY: Iran imports 70%+ of printing paper. Hormuz closure + sanctions = supply chain severed. Domestic paper mills operating at estimated 20-30% capacity due to power disruptions. Quality declining.

PRINTING CAPACITY: Tehran's major printing houses (Offset, Sepehr, etc.) operating intermittently due to power outages. 768+ hour internet blackout prevents digital prepress. Estimated 80-90% capacity reduction.

DISTRIBUTION NETWORKS: Domestic book distribution (Shahre Ketab, Book City, etc.) severely disrupted. 82,000+ structures damaged. Physical bookstores in strike zones closed. Online ordering impossible without internet.

CENSORSHIP APPARATUS: Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance (Ershad) presumably still operating but capacity unknown. Book permits may be delayed or suspended. Paradoxically, war may reduce censorship bandwidth.

PUBLISHER SOLVENCY: Small and medium publishers facing existential crisis. No sales, no distribution, no printing capacity. University presses better positioned (institutional backing) but still severely impacted. Expect consolidation/closures post-war.

DIGITAL ALTERNATIVES: Iran's digital book ecosystem (Taaghche, Fidibo) non-functional during internet blackout. Post-restoration, digital may recover faster than print. However, academic institutions require physical copies for cataloging and archival.
publishingDeepDive_fa: کاغذ و مرکب: ایران ۷۰٪+ کاغذ چاپ وارد می‌کند. هرمز + تحریم = زنجیره قطع. کارخانه‌ها ۲۰-۳۰٪ ظرفیت.

توزیع: شبکه (شهر کتاب و غیره) مختل. ۸۲,۰۰۰+ ساختمان آسیب. فروشگاه‌ها بسته. سفارش آنلاین ناممکن.
سانسور: ارشاد احتمالاً فعال اما ظرفیت نامشخص. مجوز کتاب ممکن تعلیق.
بقای ناشران: ناشران کوچک/متوسط بحران وجودی. انتشارات دانشگاهی بهتر. انتظار ادغام/تعطیلی پس از جنگ.
جایگزین دیجیتال: طاقچه، فیدیبو غیرفعال. پس بازگشت اینترنت سریع‌تر. اما دانشگاه‌ها نسخه فیزیکی نیاز دارند.

usExitPressure.reasoning: Exit narrative crystallized: Trump can frame 2-week pause as 'Pakistan asked,' 'Hormuz reopening,' 'Iran 10-pt workable basis' — all face-saving exits. Pew 60% wrong still binds. Gas $4.12. 15 KIA. Duration fatigue D39. Wall St likely rally tomorrow. US exit pressure UP 0.57 -> 0.64.
usExitPressure.reasoning_fa: پیو ۵۹٪. ۱۵ کشته. $۴.۱۰. نجات F-15 = PR. بازار صعود. اما ترامپ 'نمی‌دانم.' TACO (4 بار). ۱۰ ماده = ماه‌ها.

iranAcceptance.reasoning: Iran SNSC accepted 2-week ceasefire and agreed to Hormuz reopening coordination via Pakistan mediation — FIRST formal de-escalation step from Tehran in 39 days. Araghchi confirmed on behalf of Supreme National Security Council. Acceptance JUMP 0.08 -> 0.30. Still capped — 10-pt maximalism intact (NPT, sanctions, reparations unresolved), 2-week window = conditional pause not terms acceptance, IRGC 'outside region' rhetoric still live.
iranAcceptance.reasoning_fa: ایران ۱۰ ماده ماکسیمالیست = موضع افتتاحیه مذاکره. NPT + تحریم + بازسازی. طرح آمریکا 'بیش از حد.' سپاه 'درمانده.' DOWN 0.10->0.08. سخت‌تر.

escalationProximity.reasoning: Deadline averted. Power grid strikes SUSPENDED 14 days (0.88 -> 0.25). Hormuz reopening promised (0.67 -> 0.35). Kharg already hit but oil infra spared. Israel decoupling risk = residual (Haaretz source: IDF 'preparing extensive attack'). Escalation proximity DOWN 0.72 -> 0.42. NOT zero — Iran could freeze, Israel could strike unilaterally, Hormuz non-compliance = instant re-trigger.
escalationProximity.reasoning_fa: نیروگاه سه‌شنبه <20 ساعت. P=0.22 UP. ترامپ رد تمدید (0.88). ایران ۱۰ ماده = بدون خروج. IAEA 'deeply concerned' (0.85). تشدید UP 0.68->0.72.

outcomeProbabilities.derivation_negotiated: CRASHED from 0.30. Islamabad talks collapsed. Nuclear weapons = unbridgeable gap. No new talks scheduled. P(deal) x P(US_exit) x P(Iran_accept) all degraded.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_escalation: UP from 0.18. No diplomatic buffer. Hormuz naval confrontation. 9 days to expiry. If ceasefire expires: immediate return to strikes.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_protracted: UP from 0.36. Most likely: ceasefire limps to Apr 21, expires, war resumes in attritional posture.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_intervention: UP from 0.09. Talk failure increases pressure for external intervention.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_other: Regime fracture, coup, rogue action, black swan.

calibration.polymarketSource: Polymarket: US-Iran ceasefire by Apr 15 = 15%, by Apr 30 = 29%, by Jun 30 = 59%, by Dec 31 = 76% (Apr 7 night, post-announcement $140M+ traded). Short-dated markets repricing live.

historicalBaseRate.methodology: Of ~40 post-WWII asymmetric Middle East conflicts, ~35% resolved within 45 days (current D37). Base rate prior.

oilFuturesSignal.interpretation: Spot > futures = market expects crisis is TEMPORARY. Consistent with resolution within months, not years.

calibration.modelVsMarket: Model: 30% negotiated resolution. Market near-term: 29% (by Apr 30) jumped post-Trump announcement. Model = market convergence for first time in 39 days. Model conservative vs Apr 30 because 10-pt maximalism + Israel decoupling risk makes 2-week window more likely to collapse than settle.

confidence.methodology: Ensemble: model-derived (18%) + market signal (~28% Polymarket, crashing) + historical base rate (35%) -> weighted 22%. DOWN from 32%. Islamabad collapse destroyed primary pathway. Nuclear weapons = unbridgeable. No new talks.

deadlineHistory.threat: April 7 Tue 8PM ET power grid strikes — EXPLICITLY REFUSES to extend
deadlineHistory.outcome: BLINKED 4th time. 90 min before 8PM ET Trump announced 2-week ceasefire on conversation with PM Sharif/FM Munir, contingent on Iran reopening Hormuz. Iran SNSC accepted. Peace talks Islamabad Fri (Vance lead).

trumpPattern.methodology: Bayesian: prior P(follow-through) = 0.70. 3 observed blinks → posterior ~0.16. ADJUSTED UP to 0.22 for: (1) Trump explicitly refuses to extend (different signal from 'good chance'), (2) South Pars energy war precedent already set, (3) Iran 10-pt maximalist = no off-ramp, (4) credibility pressure = 4th blink would be devastating, (5) Iran military defiance = no compliance signal.

probabilityChangelog.reason: B-52 bombing. Oil dropped. China-Pakistan plan.
Al-Salmi tanker attacked. Oil crashed to $102.
Kharazi struck. Trump primetime. Iran rejected ceasefire.
F-15E shot down. Oil surged $112. Half launchers intact.
Bushehr NPP 4th hit. A-10 downed. Iran rejected ceasefire again.
WSO rescued. CMA CGM through Hormuz. Kuwait infrastructure hit.
Iran 10-pt maximalist counteroffer. Trump refuses to extend. Markets surged but gap widened. P(follow-through) UP to 0.22.
Deadline day. Trump explicit no-extend language. Iran 10-pt maximalist stands. IRGC hardening. P(follow-through) 0.22.
Ceasefire Day 1. 2-week pact. Islamabad talks announced.
Ceasefire holding. Lebanon fracture. Talks moved to Sat.
Talks delayed. Hormuz re-closing. Lebanon continued.
Islamabad talks began — 21-hr marathon. Highest hopes.
TALKS COLLAPSED. Iran refused nuclear commitment. No new talks. -13 largest single-day drop.

sensitivity.input: If a credible deal proposal emerges
sensitivity.interpretation: A credible counter-proposal from Iran would have the largest single impact on resolution probability.

sensitivity.input: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate
sensitivity.interpretation: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate (e.g., Hormuz opening offer), probability triples. This is the binding constraint.
US already wants out. More pressure doesn't help much because the bottleneck is deal + Iran acceptance, not US willingness.
Escalation doesn't increase resolution — it changes the TYPE of resolution (forced vs negotiated). Impact on probability is indirect.

sensitivity.input: If Trump follows through on threat
sensitivity.interpretation: Whether Trump strikes power grid doesn't affect negotiated resolution — it affects escalation vs continuation. Different outcome, same low deal probability.

leadingIndicators.signal: Steady at ~41/day. Rationing model holds. Coordinated barrage + IRGC defiance = institutional continuity proven.
$109.53 settled. Wall Street surged on hope. Markets vs reality mismatch. Binary: $85 or $130+ in <20 hrs.
10/day. Iran 10-pt demands Hormuz toll recognition = permanent change. Won't reopen for temp ceasefire.
Iran 10-pt = most detailed response ever. Islamabad Accord + 10-pt counteroffer = highest specificity. But MAXIMALIST gap.
Declining further. Trump 'I don't know' = allies questioning strategy. Mirror: 'TACO Trump.' IAEA 'deeply concerned.'

ceasefireCalibration.source: Polymarket implied ~28% ceasefire holds through Apr 21 (crashing post-Islamabad collapse). Historical base rate ~50%.

incidents.description: Israel struck 100+ sites in Lebanon. Iran accused US of ceasefire violation via proxy.
incidents.description_fa: اسرائیل بیش از ۱۰۰ هدف در لبنان را بمباران کرد. ایران آمریکا را به نقض آتش‌بس از طریق نماینده متهم کرد.

incidents.description: Lebanon strikes continued. Iran demands Lebanon inclusion in ceasefire.
incidents.description_fa: حملات لبنان ادامه. ایران خواستار شمول لبنان.

incidents.description: US warships attempted Hormuz transit. IRGC issued 'last warning.' Israel rejected Hezbollah ceasefire.
incidents.description_fa: ناوهای آمریکا تلاش عبور هرمز. سپاه 'آخرین هشدار.' اسرائیل رد آتش‌بس حزب‌الله.

incidents.description: 21-hour talks collapsed. Iran refused nuclear commitment. Vance walked out. No new talks scheduled.
incidents.description_fa: مذاکرات ۲۱ ساعته شکست. ایران رد تعهد هسته‌ای. ونس خارج شد. مذاکرات جدید برنامه‌ریزی نشده.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Trump announces 2-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan PM Sharif + FM Munir. Iran SNSC accepts via Araghchi.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: ترامپ آتش‌بس دو هفته‌ای را اعلام کرد. شورای عالی امنیت ملی ایران از طریق عراقچی پذیرفت.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Islamabad peace talks announced for Friday Apr 11. VP Vance to lead US delegation.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات صلح اسلام‌آباد برای جمعه ۱۱ آوریل اعلام شد. وایس پنس وانس هیئت آمریکا را رهبری خواهد کرد.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Talks reportedly delayed to Saturday Apr 12. Iran delegation composition unclear.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات ظاهراً به شنبه ۱۲ آوریل موکول شد. ترکیب هیئت ایران نامشخص است.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Talks delayed from Friday to Saturday. Lebanon strikes escalated. Iran re-halted Hormuz opening.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات از جمعه به شنبه موکول شد. حملات لبنان تشدید. ایران بازگشایی هرمز متوقف.

ceasefireNegotiations.event: Islamabad talks began — 21-hour marathon. US delegation ~300 (Vance, Witkoff, Kushner) vs Iran ~70 (Ghalibaf, Araghchi). Largest diplomatic meeting of the war.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات اسلام‌آباد شروع — ماراتن ۲۱ ساعته. هیئت آمریکا ~۳۰۰ (ونس، ویتکاف، کوشنر) مقابل ایران ~۷۰ (قالیباف، عراقچی).

ceasefireNegotiations.event: TALKS COLLAPSED. Iran refused to commit to forgoing nuclear weapons. Vance left saying 'not enough.' Ghalibaf blamed US 'maximalism.' No new talks scheduled. Ceasefire expires Apr 21.
ceasefireNegotiations.event_fa: مذاکرات شکست. ایران رد تعهد هسته‌ای. ونس: 'کافی نیست.' قالیباف: 'ماکسیمالیسم آمریکا.' مذاکرات جدید نیست. آتش‌بس ۲۱ آوریل.

ceasefireEconomicRecovery.note: Hormuz REVERSING — Iran re-closed after Lebanon strikes. Ships stranded rising again. Oil climbing on talk collapse.

branchExtend.detail: Most likely if framework but no final agreement. Pakistan mediates.

branchDeal.detail: Mine clearance, insurance normalization, escorts resume.

branchCollapse.detail: Immediate return to pre-ceasefire dynamics. Worse — broken trust amplifies.
Worse than before — broken ceasefire = higher risk premium.

branchStalled.detail: Talks stall, Hormuz slow, both sides posturing.
Tension builds. Markets re-price war risk.
